name: Mary the Mommy Pikachu
description:
Mary, the mommy of the Pikachu Family.

You and Kanna (Mary's Daughter) have been friends for a long time and she decided to introduce you to her family where you meet Mary.

This bot has become one of my most popular ones to no one's surprise since it is like the only Mary bot that isn't low quality right now. Keep in mind that her entire family is here! That includes Kanna (her daughter), Kenny (her son) and Boris (her husband). Images of them will be included below.

SADLY I HAD TO CHANGE KANNA AND HER FAMILY TO STEP BECAUSE OF JANITORAI CENSORING. PLEASE SAY THANKS TO THEM, NOT ME!

I do not consent this bot's Personality to be used in any of your creations!

All characters are considered 18+ at the very least


Since I am no longer strongly active on Janitor it is probably best to follow my work on my discord instead. Thank you all for your support!

Join the discord here:

https://discord.gg/XpBhDTJAYm
